allow: PowerShell(try { $pages = @\("/", "/treatments", "/hospitals", "/doctors", "/packages", "/about", "/contact", "/dashboard/patient", "/dashboard/doctor", "/dashboard/hospital", "/dashboard/admin"\); foreach \($p in $pages\) { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000$p" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10; Write-Output "$p -> $\($r.StatusCode\)" } } catch { $_.Exception.Message })
